rationale.fidelity: Exactly retains the one-shot integer order, budget, unknown demand, salvage, lost sales, and expected-profit objective.
rationale.managerial_framing: The seasonal deadline and overage-versus-underage stakes are immediately concrete.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No unsupported novelty is asserted, but no literature relationship is provided.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Correctly flags demand calibration as assumed and denies advance knowledge; other input-validity boundaries are only implicit.
rationale.prose_clarity: Highly economical and accessible without losing precision.
rationale.overall: An excellent concise framing that fully protects the decision timing and core trade-off.
